text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy forest town, there lived a rabbit who loved nothing more than lounging under big oak trees mulling over butterflies. Every dawn she'd stretch lazily, her tiny earsPerking up only when she heard a friendly squirrel chatter about shiny new acorn hoaxes.

One rainy afternoon, while exploring a secluded clearing she'd seldom visited, Olive stumbled upon an odd-looking stone. It hummed softly, like a distant bird song playing a melody only she could hear. Her curiosity piqued, she sat down at its base and closed her eyes.

The stone began to whisper tales of a great treasure deep within the forest. It spoke of a moonlit lake filled with reflective waterlilies that glowed like distant stars. There, mythical creatures would swim beneath the surface, their silvery scales glowing brighter than sunlit sky.

Olive listened intently as the stone recounted tales of brave souls who had found happiness beyond dreams, living out their lives singing songs about
